checks.detail: hiking needs easy, hiking needs moderate, hiking needs strenuous

tip_quality_findings: These tips offer insightful, location-specific advice that enhances the experience for visitors to Zion National Park.

Hike to Angel's Landing (9/10): This tip is highly specific to a viewpoint along the hike and provides a distinctive insight that many might overlook, especially regarding the lighting conditions at sunset.
Explore The Narrows (10/10): This tip uniquely highlights a less-traveled starting point that offers distinct views and experiences, ensuring visitors have a less crowded and more enjoyable hike.
Winter Stargazing (8/10): The tip gives a specific location and positioning for optimal stargazing, although it could benefit from mentioning timing related to seasonal variations in visibility.
Hidden Canyon Trail (9/10): The suggestion to explore an unmarked path for a unique photo opportunity adds an exciting element of adventure that many may miss along the well-trodden main trail.
Riverside Walk (8/10): This tip provides a specific spot for a scenic view, capturing a moment that enhances the experience, although it could be more precise about the ideal time to witness it.
